title: Hot weather forecast with light rain along the coast
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather update from the South African Weather Service, hot weather is anticipated on Sunday.


> Fire danger warnings


Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over most parts of Namakwa district in the Northern Cape and the Bergrivier municipality in the Western Cape, today and tomorrow as well as over Beaufort West municipality on Sunday 22 December.


> Advisory


Extremely uncomfortable conditions are expected in places over the West Coast, Oudtshoorn and Khai-Ma municipalities today and tomorrow, including the Kamiesberg municipality and parts of the Central and Little Karoo tomorrow, 22 December.

Here are your expected temperatures on Sunday:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
